Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log in light of normative rules and desiderata

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First define the strict normative rules from Part 1 Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case Not allowed Skipping activities in required sequence changing order Finalize Documentation after rejection Closing case without following decision logic

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Timestamp order Application Received 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Documentation 1330 Close Case 1400 Sequence matches exactly App Rec Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case No violations All strict rules followed No skipped steps order correct for approved finalize doc before close So normative rules satisfied

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Activities Application Received 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Documentation 1000 Close Case 1030 Sequence App Rec Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rej Finalize Documentation Close Case Strict order Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment but here Risk Assessment is before Credit Check So violates ordering rule Also after Loan Decision Rejected they did Finalize Documentation Thats not allowed If the loan is rejected the case should be closed without finalizing documentation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also might be missing Inform Applicant Lets check Sequence says after Loan Decision must Inform Applicant In Case 2 after Loan Decision Rejected they have Finalize Documentation 1000 and Close Case 1030 There is no Inform Applicant activity in the log Thats a missing required activity Normative rule Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 2 violates Credit Check after Risk Assessment order missing Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation after rejection contradictory action

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Activities Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case All required activities present order correct Credit Check before Risk Assessment Loan Decision after Risk Assessment Inform Applicant after Loan Decision Finalize Documentation before Close Case for approved No normative violations So Case 3 obeys strict rules

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now desiderata Part 2 describes recommendations Credit Check completed within 24 hours after application received Applicant informed within 48 hours of loan decision Perform a Follow up Call sometime before closing the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Application Received 2024 01 10 0900 Credit Check 2024 01 10 0930 within 24 hours Loan Decision 2024 01 10 1100 Inform Applicant 2024 01 10 1300 within 48 hours Follow up Call no activity so Case 1 lacks Follow up Call So desideratum violation no Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Application Received 2024 01 11 0800 Credit Check 2024 01 11 0900 within 24 hours Inform Applicant missing entirely so no timing can be checked Follow up Call no activity so missing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The primary violation is normative so we will note that Case 2 also lacks Follow up Call and fails to inform at all which is normative

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received 2024 01 12 0900 Credit Check 2024 01 14 1000 greater than 24 hours so desideratum violation Loan Decision 2024 01 14 1200 Inform Applicant 2024 01 16 1500 more than 48 hours so desideratum violation Also Follow up Call explicitly absent so all three desiderata violated

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For Case 2 maybe the process was executed incorrectly because of human error or system misconfiguration Risk Assessment performed prematurely perhaps due to urgency but still violates rules Finalize Documentation after rejection could be a mistake they accidentally triggered documentation step Missing Inform Applicant might be because they thought they could skip for rejection

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For Case 3 timings are delayed maybe the credit check took longer due to high workload or external dependency like waiting for credit bureau response Informing applicant late might be because they wanted to prepare full documentation before informing No follow up call might be omitted due to resource constraints These are suboptimal but permissible
